_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1-dependent tumors require a microenvironment containing Nf1+/-- and c-kit-dependent bone marrow.

_contextSnippet: Six months after transplantation, the functional germline WT (Krox20;Nf1flox/flox) recipients engrafted with heterozygous Nf1+/− bone marrow began to exhibit motor paralysis, weight loss and only 15% of mice survived
details: Only 15% survival when engrafted with heterozygous Nf1+/− bone marrow, with motor paralysis and weight loss beginning at 6 months
